releases.summary: Initial Phase 1/Phase 2 knowledge base snapshot for local and controlled Moodle pilot testing.
changes: Baseline FYEC100 course overview and expectations
Escalation guidance for lecturer and LMS administrator follow-up
knownLimitations: Knowledge base review is still pending.
Pilot content should be reviewed by the lecturer/content owner before wider student use.
Moodle-specific instructions may need adjustment after the pilot course shell is confirmed.
releases.notes: Do not treat this release as final production course policy.

governanceNotes: Use release notes to identify which knowledge base version was used in each pilot stage.
Only include approved content changes in a release.
Do not store student records, grades, IDs, or private student information in release notes.
